## Summary

**Root cause:** `buildPovStructureLayer` in `buildStoryLayerFromLedger.ts` derived POV characters by filtering the identity ledger for `protagonist` / `co_protagonist` roles. This meant any character tagged as `co_protagonist` (e.g. Robert Lebrun in *The Awakening*) was auto-promoted to POV owner, even when they never own the narrative camera.

**Fix:** POV layer now uses actual `pov_signal` data from chunk outputs via `buildPovStructureFromChunkOutputs`. Only characters with focalization evidence (`close_third_limited`, `first_person_narrator`, etc.) appear as POV owners. Falls back to role-based derivation only for legacy data without `pov_signal`.

**The Awakening regression:** Edna Pontellier is the sole POV owner (100% narrative share, close third limited). Robert Lebrun is structurally major (present in 6/10 chunks) but is correctly excluded from POV because he never owns the camera.

## Scope

**Touches:**
- `lib/evaluation/phase1a/buildStoryLayerFromLedger.ts` — `buildPovStructureLayer` now accepts chunk outputs and uses `buildPovStructureFromChunkOutputs` for actual focalization data
- `lib/evaluation/processor.ts` — passes `sortedChunkOutputs` to `buildStoryLayerFromLedger`
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/prompts/pass1a-character-sweep.ts` — v10: expanded POV/camera guidance distinguishing focalization from narrative importance
- `components/ledger/StoryLedgerLayers.tsx` — POV layer renders `pov_type`, `narrative_share_pct`, `is_primary` when available; expanded role labels
- `__tests__/lib/evaluation/phase1a/buildStoryLayerFromLedger.awakening-pov.test.ts` — 4 regression tests

**Does NOT touch:**
- No schema changes
- No scoring changes
- No report renderer changes
- No badge/status work
- No Revise workbench changes
- No relationship/symbol/pronoun/location fixes (those are A3–A7)

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Backward compatible: when no chunk outputs are available (legacy evaluations), falls back to the old role-based POV derivation with a detection note warning
- New evaluations will use actual focalization data, which may reduce POV character count for novels where co-protagonists don't own the camera
- Prompt v10 includes The Awakening as an explicit example — this is intentional guidance, not test pollution

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: N/A — this changes the POV layer extraction logic within the existing Phase 1A pipeline. No new pipeline stages, no latency impact, no new API calls.
